summaryAnalyses.title: How each trait segment fared and why
summaryAnalyses.instruction: For each dominant-trait segment, summarize in 1-2 sentences how these personas fared in the match and what drove the result, so a reviewer sees how personality shaped play. Be faithful and concise; do not invent facts.

summaryAnalyses.title: Reasoning trajectory by dominant trait
summaryAnalyses.instruction: For each dominant-trait segment, summarize in 1-2 sentences how the persona reasoned across the run (what they attended to, how they made their moves), so a reviewer sees how personality shaped decision-making. Be faithful and concise; do not invent facts.

signalScans.title: Play-style signal scan by trait
signalScans.prompt: Read the persona's reasoning trajectory across the run and classify which play-style signals are present. This is a starting rubric; some signals are game-specific (duels, proximity-seeking, bluffing) and may be extended per game.
signalScans.rubric: Mark a signal true only when the reasoning text clearly states or strongly implies it.

signals.label: Seemed lost or contradictory about the game state
Read as playful or fun rather than mechanical
